title: Mixed-priority batch creation
description: Probes whether the agent correctly varies a per-item field (priority) within a single batch creation request, rather than collapsing everything to one value or issuing one call per task.
promptTemplate: Create a project called "{{prefix}}Feature Backlog" with 6 tasks: two low priority (priority 1) called "{{prefix}}low-N", two medium priority (priority 3) called "{{prefix}}med-N", and two high priority (priority 5) called "{{prefix}}high-N" (N=1..2 within each group).
